productDisplayName: Fila Men Set IV White Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Set IV shoe comes in a sleek design and is packed with features, making it a great buy.UpperSynthetic leather upper with strategically placed overlays for enhanced shoe structurePerforated on the forefoot and midfoot and has a mesh tongue and collar for enhanced breathable comfortLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionPivot point on the big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement of the footFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
